sub_questions.question_text: (a) In the diagram, $PQR$ is a circle with centre $O$. If $\angle RQP = 46^{\circ}$, find $\angle RPQ$.

(b) A train is scheduled to cover a distance of $120\text{ km}$ at a certain average speed, $r$. Due to some technical challenges the average speed is reduced by $5\text{ 	ext{km/h}}$ thereby increasing the scheduled time by $20$ minutes. Find the average speed, $r$.
